## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` is clean and `cargo clippy --all-features --all-targets` passes.
- [ ] `cargo test --all-features` passes; I added/updated tests where it makes sense.
- [ ] Frontend changes pass `npm run lint`, `npm run test`, and `npm run build`.
- [ ] Docs are updated for any behaviour or API change.
- [ ] All commits are **signed off** for the DCO (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or local data are included in this PR.
